side_effects.description: Barely felt like getting out of bed, felt awful, wanted to die, bedridden/very low energy for approximately a week
Significant gastrointestinal distress - gas from both ends, uneasy stomach persisting for 7+ days

protocol_notes: OP intended to take 0.50mg but accidentally administered 5mg as their very first dose due to confusion between units on syringe and mg. Used a 12mg vial reconstituted with 1.2mL BAC water. OP is planning to wait approximately one week before attempting a very small microdose. Confirmed accidental overdose due to misunderstanding of measurement conversions.
